ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the building is located */,
  "cost_center" TEXT /* Cost center associated with the building */,
  "telco_code" TEXT /* Telecommunication code for the building */,
  "current_use" TEXT /* Current use of the building */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the building is located */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Local currency name */,
  "building_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "building_size" INTEGER /* Size of the building in square meters */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "building_manager" TEXT /* Name of the building manager */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_currency_name FOREIGN KEY ("currency_name") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_cost_center FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "building_id" TEXT /* Reference to the building */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost was recorded */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the local currency */,
  "rent" REAL /* Rent cost in local currency */,
  "utilities" REAL /* Utilities cost in local currency */,
  "facility" REAL /* Facility cost in local currency */,
  "supplies" REAL /* Supplies cost in local currency */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cost */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of the cost */,
  "cost_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the cost */,
  "cost_status" TEXT /* Status of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_exchange_rate FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate") REFERENCES currencies ("exchange_rate"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  "region_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the region's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_centers" (
  "cost_center_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cost center */,
  "cost_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost center */,
  "cost_center_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cost center */,
  "cost_center_manager" TEXT /* Name of the cost center manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the local currency */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the country */,
  "country_timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "currency_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)
column_names: Region where the building is located
Cost center associated with the building
Country where the building is located
Size of the building in square meters
Unique identifier for each cost entry
Date and time when the cost was recorded
Exchange rate for the local currency
A brief description of the cost
Country where the region is located
A brief description of the region
Unique identifier for each cost center
A brief description of the cost center
Name of the cost center manager
A brief description of the country
A brief description of the currency
